title: Vaccine update: issue 298, August 2019
body: "The August issue features:   August bank holiday deliveries warning notice update on MMR vaccine ordering restriction  MMR catch up for 10 and 11 year olds which flu vaccines children should have vaccine information and availability for 2019 to 2020 NHS.UK vaccination pages algorithm – vaccination of individuals with uncertain or incomplete immunisation status inactivated influenza vaccines guidance for 2019 to 2020 flu season vaccines and porcine gelatine leaflet revision DTaP/IPV/Hib Booster PGD expiry and withdrawal at the end of August 2019 ordering additional Gardasil for the universal HPV immunisation programme unused Fluenz Tetra vaccine in the 2018 to 2019 children’s flu programme the EU Falsified Medicines Directive (FMD) and Delegated Regulation as applicable to PHE supplied vaccines for the national immunisation programme vaccine supply for the non routine programme   "
